name: Hank D'Amico
abstract: Hank D'Amico (March 21, 1915 – December 2, 1965) was an American jazz clarinetist.

about_quotes.speaker: William Randolph "Cozy" Cole
about_quotes.evidence: I had a little trio in there, my trio with Hank D'Amico and John Guarnieri.

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I turned to Hank D’Amico, who was playing clarinet... Buddy’s at the piano, and he’s shaking his head... they’re all following me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: Hank D'Amico, the terrific clarinetist, and I would follow--- I knew what he was trying to do. I really didn't know the other members of the group too well.
